title: Solana Agent Wallet Watcher
description: Subscribe to any Solana address via GoldRush's wallet activity stream on `solana-mainnet` and receive push events for every SPL token transfer, program invocation, and stake account change — no polling required. Use the event payload (program name, instruction type, token amounts, counterparty address) to trigger downstream agent actions: execute a hedge, send an alert, update agent memory, or rebalance a portfolio the moment a transaction lands.
